storyboard.content: I have really severe burning pain every time I urinate. It's been going on for several days and it's getting worse.
I noticed blood in my urine. It's been there for the past few days and it's really scaring me.
I have pain in my lower back on the right side. It's a dull aching pain that's been there along with everything else.
I've been having chills and I feel feverish. My temperature is 101.5 degrees Fahrenheit.
I have to go to the bathroom every 30 minutes, even through the night. I can't get any rest because I keep waking up to go.
This started about 5 days ago and has been getting steadily worse. In the last 24 hours things have gone downhill really fast.
The pain is about an 8 out of 10. It's disrupting my sleep and making it hard to get through the day.
I'm a 42-year-old man. I don't have any known urinary or kidney problems that I'm aware of.
